## 261. AAQ-261

**Question**

List appointments scheduled this month.

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  ) AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
  AND a.schedule_time < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month'
ORDER BY a.schedule_time ASC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

**Generated final answer**

Total matching records: 3

Here is the complete list:

| Appointment ID | Scheduled time | Lead | Event name | Call category | Outcome | Outcome role | No-show | Source | Host ID | Setter ID | Has Fathom record |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1015339c-c476-424a-9d7d-3c3c6916cd24 | 2026-05-01 08:00 UTC | Wesley Helmers | Qualification Call Freedom Academy (DMB) | Sales Call | No Sale - Follow Up | Follow Up | No | Calendly | user_3ATRxXyN4j8bDHYJKRCEMAerasy | No Setter | No |
| 3ade1793-ba69-47e0-9ba1-27be6dd2f1e9 | 2026-05-05 13:00 UTC | Ricardo Brandao | Strategy Call - Freedom - FU | Sales Call | Rescheduled | Rescheduled | No | Calendly | user_3ATRxXyN4j8bDHYJKRCEMAerasy | No Setter | No |
| c5fe18fe-b837-47f0-8e23-a58097409a19 | 2026-05-29 14:00 UTC | Pascal van Leeuwen | Qualification Call Freedom Academy (TF) | Sales Call | No Sale - Follow Up | Follow Up | No | Calendly | user_3ATRxXyN4j8bDHYJKRCEMAerasy | user_3AesMObeGeZynVoGhloMkfwanES | No |

## 262. AAQ-262

**Question**

Show appointments from last week.

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  ) AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time >= DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW()) - INTERVAL '1 week'
  AND a.schedule_time < DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW())
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

## 264. AAQ-264

**Question**

Show the first 20 appointment records.

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  ) AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT :limit;
```

## 265. AAQ-265

**Question**

Give me appointments sorted by latest schedule time.

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  ) AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

**Generated final answer**

Total matching appointments: 451

```sql
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  ) AS has_fathom_record

LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
```

## 267. AAQ-267

**Question**

Show coaching call appointments only.

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  ) AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.snapshot_call_category = 'COACHING_CALL'
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

No coaching call appointments were found.

**Question**

Show triage call appointments only.

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  ) AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.snapshot_call_category = 'TRIAGE_CALL'
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

## 269. AAQ-269

**Question**

Which appointments came from Calendly?

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  ) AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.source = :appointment_source
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

## 270. AAQ-270

**Question**

Which appointments were created manually?

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.created_at,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  ) AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.source = 'MANUAL'
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

**Generated final answer**

No manually created appointments were found.

**Execution time:** 7.191 sec
**Status:** ok

## 274. AAQ-274

**Question**

Which appointments have outcome as Follow Up?

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  ) AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND (
    outcome.name = 'Follow Up'
    OR outcome.role = 'FOLLOW_UP'
  )
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

## 275. AAQ-275

**Question**

Which appointments ended as Won?

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  ) AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') = 'WON'
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

## 276. AAQ-276

**Question**

Which appointments ended as Lost?

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  ) AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') = 'LOST'
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

**Generated final answer**

Total matching appointments: 41

## 277. AAQ-277

**Question**

Show appointments that have no outcome label.

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  'No Outcome' AS outcome_name,
  'NO_OUTCOME' AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  ) AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.outcome_id IS NULL
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

**Generated final answer**

There are no appointments without an outcome label.

**Execution time:** 8.292 sec
**Status:** ok

## 278. AAQ-278

**Question**

List appointments with their Fathom status.

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM fathom_call_records f_check
      WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
        AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
    ) THEN 'Has Fathom Record'
    ELSE 'No Fathom Record'
  END AS fathom_status
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

**Generated final answer**

Total matching records: 451

## 279. AAQ-279

**Question**

Show me appointment records with lead and event name.

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id AS appointment_id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS lead_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

## 280. AAQ-280

**Question**

Can you give me a clean list of calls with schedule time and outcome?

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

**Generated final answer**

Total matching records: 451

Showing the first 20 calls:

| Call ID | Name | Scheduled time | Outcome |

## 281. AAQ-281

**Question**

Which appointments were no-shows?

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  ) AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()
  AND a.no_show = true
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

**Generated final answer**

Total matching records: 54

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,

  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  ) AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id

LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet

 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false

ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
```

## 283. AAQ-283

**Question**

List calls where the lead did not show up.

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  ) AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()
  AND a.no_show = true
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

## 284. AAQ-284

**Question**

Which scheduled calls were missed?

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  ) AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()
  AND a.no_show = true
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

**Generated final answer**

Total matching records: 54

## 285. AAQ-285

**Question**

Show no-show calls from this month.

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  ) AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
  AND a.schedule_time < LEAST(NOW(), DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month')
  AND a.no_show = true
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

**Generated final answer**

There are no no-show calls scheduled so far this month.

**Execution time:** 7.440 sec
**Status:** ok

## 286. AAQ-286

**Question**

List no-show appointments from last week.

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  ) AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.no_show = true
  AND a.schedule_time >= DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 week'
  AND a.schedule_time < DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE)
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

**Generated final answer**

There were no no-show appointments last week.

**Execution time:** 7.985 sec
**Status:** ok

```sql
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
```

## 289. AAQ-289

**Question**

Show no-shows by lead name.

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  ) AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()
  AND a.no_show = true
ORDER BY display_name ASC, a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

```sql
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,

  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  EXISTS (

    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id

 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id

  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id

 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
```

## 291. AAQ-291

**Question**

Which Calendly appointments were no-shows?

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  ) AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()
  AND a.no_show = true
  AND a.source = 'CALENDLY'
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

## 292. AAQ-292

**Question**

Which manual appointments were no-shows?

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  ) AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()
  AND a.no_show = true
  AND a.source = 'MANUAL'
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

**Generated final answer**

There are no manual appointments marked as no-shows.

**Execution time:** 9.521 sec
**Status:** ok

```sql
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,

    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  ) AS has_fathom_record

LEFT JOIN leads l

 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
```

## 294. AAQ-294

**Question**

List no-show coaching calls.

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  ) AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()
  AND a.no_show = true
  AND a.snapshot_call_category = 'COACHING_CALL'
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

**Generated final answer**

There are no no-show coaching calls.

```sql
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  true AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()
  AND a.no_show = true
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  )
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

**Generated final answer**

Total matching records: 1

## 299. AAQ-299

**Question**

Which no-show appointments do not have Fathom records?

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  false AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()
  AND a.no_show = true
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  )
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

```sql
SELECT

  a.id,

    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  ) AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false

  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time >= :start_date
  AND a.schedule_time < :end_date
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()

LIMIT 20;
```

## 301. AAQ-301

**Question**

What is the Fathom coverage for past appointments?

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS total_past_appointments,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FILTER (WHERE f.id IS NOT NULL) AS appointments_with_fathom,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FILTER (WHERE f.id IS NULL) AS appointments_without_fathom,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FILTER (WHERE f.id IS NOT NULL) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT a.id), 0),
    2
  ) AS fathom_coverage_percent
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN fathom_call_records f
  ON f.appointment_id = a.id
 AND f.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW();
```

**Generated final answer**

Out of 449 past appointments, 82 have Fathom records and 367 do not. The Fathom coverage for past appointments is 18.26%.

**Execution time:** 5.835 sec
**Status:** ok

## 310. AAQ-310

**Question**

What share of past calls have Fathom summaries available?

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS total_past_appointments,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FILTER (WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(f.summary), '') IS NOT NULL) AS appointments_with_fathom_summaries,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FILTER (
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM fathom_call_records f2
      WHERE f2.appointment_id = a.id
        AND f2.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
        AND NULLIF(TRIM(f2.summary), '') IS NOT NULL
    )
  ) AS appointments_without_fathom_summaries,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FILTER (WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(f.summary), '') IS NOT NULL)
    / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT a.id), 0),
    2
  ) AS fathom_summary_coverage_percent
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN fathom_call_records f
  ON f.appointment_id = a.id
 AND f.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW();
```

**Generated final answer**

Out of 449 past calls, 80 have Fathom summaries available. The share is 17.82%.

**Execution time:** 8.903 sec
**Status:** ok

## 314. AAQ-314

**Question**

What is Fathom coverage by event type?

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS total_past_appointments,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FILTER (WHERE f.id IS NOT NULL) AS appointments_with_fathom,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FILTER (WHERE f.id IS NULL) AS appointments_without_fathom,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FILTER (WHERE f.id IS NOT NULL) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT a.id), 0),
    2
  ) AS fathom_coverage_percent,
  SUM(COUNT(DISTINCT a.id)) OVER() AS total_matching_past_appointments,
  ROUND(
    COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(COUNT(DISTINCT a.id)) OVER(), 0),
    2
  ) AS percentage_of_total_past_appointments
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN fathom_call_records f
  ON f.appointment_id = a.id
 AND f.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()
GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type')
ORDER BY fathom_coverage_percent DESC NULLS LAST, total_past_appointments DESC, event_name ASC;
```

**Generated final answer**

Total matching past appointments: 449

Here is the breakdown:

| Event Type | Past Appointments | With Fathom | Without Fathom | Fathom Coverage | % of Total Past Appointments |

| Qualification Call Freedom Academy (DMB) | 71 | 6 | 65 | 8.45% | 15.81% |
| Strategy Call - Freedom - FU | 24 | 2 | 22 | 8.33% | 5.35% |
| Strategy Call - Freedom (TFT) | 22 | 1 | 21 | 4.55% | 4.90% |
| Strategy Call - Freedom | 40 | 0 | 40 | 0.00% | 8.91% |
| Qualification Call Freedom Academy (DML) | 6 | 0 | 6 | 0.00% | 1.34% |
| Qualification Call Freedom Academy (DM) | 1 | 0 | 1 | 0.00% | 0.22% |
| Unknown | 1 | 0 | 1 | 0.00% | 0.22% |

## 315. AAQ-315

**Question**

```sql
SELECT
  COALESCE(CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text), 'UNKNOWN') AS call_category,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS total_past_appointments,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FILTER (WHERE f.id IS NOT NULL) AS appointments_with_fathom,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FILTER (WHERE f.id IS NULL) AS appointments_without_fathom,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FILTER (WHERE f.id IS NOT NULL) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT a.id), 0),
    2
  ) AS fathom_coverage_percent,
  SUM(COUNT(DISTINCT a.id)) OVER() AS total_matching_past_appointments,
  ROUND(
    COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(COUNT(DISTINCT a.id)) OVER(), 0),
    2
  ) AS percentage_of_total_past_appointments
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN fathom_call_records f
  ON f.appointment_id = a.id
 AND f.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()
GROUP BY COALESCE(CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text), 'UNKNOWN')
ORDER BY fathom_coverage_percent DESC NULLS LAST, total_past_appointments DESC, call_category ASC;
```

## 321. AAQ-321

**Question**

Which appointments have no Fathom call record?

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  false AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  )
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

**Generated final answer**

Total matching records: 367

Showing the first 20 appointments with no Fathom call record:

## 322. AAQ-322

**Question**

Show me calls missing Fathom records.

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  false AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  )
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

## 323. AAQ-323

**Question**

List past appointments without Fathom.

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  false AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  )
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

**Generated final answer**

## 324. AAQ-324

**Question**

Which completed calls were not captured by Fathom?

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  false AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()
  AND a.no_show = false
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  )
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

## 325. AAQ-325

**Question**

Show appointments missing Fathom for this month.

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  false AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time >= DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW())
  AND a.schedule_time < LEAST(NOW(), DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW()) + INTERVAL '1 month')
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  )
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

**Generated final answer**

Total matching records: 1

## 327. AAQ-327

**Question**

Which sales calls have no Fathom record?

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  false AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()
  AND a.snapshot_call_category = 'SALES_CALL'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  )
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

## 328. AAQ-328

**Question**

Which coaching calls are missing Fathom?

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  false AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()
  AND a.snapshot_call_category = 'COACHING_CALL'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  )
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

**Generated final answer**

There are no past coaching calls missing Fathom.

**Execution time:** 8.395 sec
**Status:** ok

## 329. AAQ-329

**Question**

Show missing Fathom calls by host.

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS appointments_without_fathom,
  SUM(COUNT(DISTINCT a.id)) OVER() AS total_matching_appointments,
  ROUND(
    COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(COUNT(DISTINCT a.id)) OVER(), 0),
    2
  ) AS percentage_of_total
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN fathom_call_records f
  ON f.appointment_id = a.id
 AND f.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()
  AND f.id IS NULL
GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host')
ORDER BY appointments_without_fathom DESC, host_id ASC;
```

**Generated final answer**

Total matching appointments: 367

Here is the breakdown:

| Host | Missing Fathom calls | % of total |
|---|---:|---:|
| user_3AZPWYViL4vUfqNXmNLhNcYAwX4 | 198 | 53.95% |
| user_3ATRxXyN4j8bDHYJKRCEMAerasy | 168 | 45.78% |
| user_3ARuEgINlhhlbVsZYBbgBDeOEjr | 1 | 0.27% |

**Status:** ok

## 331. AAQ-331

**Question**

Which event types have appointments missing Fathom?

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS appointments_missing_fathom,
  SUM(COUNT(DISTINCT a.id)) OVER() AS total_matching_appointments,
  ROUND(
    COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(COUNT(DISTINCT a.id)) OVER(), 0),
    2
  ) AS percentage_of_total
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN fathom_call_records f
  ON f.appointment_id = a.id
 AND f.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()
GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type')
HAVING COUNT(f.id) = 0
ORDER BY appointments_missing_fathom DESC, event_name ASC;
```

## 332. AAQ-332

**Question**

Can you list appointments that should have Fathom but do not?

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  false AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  )
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

```sql
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,

    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),

    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  false AS has_fathom_record

LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
```

## 334. AAQ-334

**Question**

Show past manual calls with no Fathom record.

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  false AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()
  AND a.source = 'MANUAL'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  )
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

**Generated final answer**

There are no past manual calls without a Fathom record.

**Execution time:** 9.500 sec
**Status:** ok

## 336. AAQ-336

**Question**

Give me the latest calls missing Fathom.

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  false AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  )
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

## 337. AAQ-337

**Question**

List missed Fathom records for last week appointments.

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  false AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time >= DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 week'
  AND a.schedule_time < DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE)
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  )
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

**Generated final answer**

Total matching records: 9

## 338. AAQ-338

**Question**

Which attended calls do not have Fathom attached?

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  false AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()
  AND a.no_show = false
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  )
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

## 339. AAQ-339

**Question**

Show calls where Fathom was not matched.

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  f.id AS fathom_record_id,
  f.fathom_call_id,
  f.fathom_meeting_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.ai_generated_title), ''), 'Untitled Call') AS call_title,
  f.summary,
  f.call_duration_seconds,
  f.call_started_at,
  f.call_ended_at,
  f.created_at
FROM fathom_call_records f
WHERE f.clerk_org_id = :org_id

LIMIT 20;
```

## 340. AAQ-340

**Question**

Which past calls are missing the Fathom link?

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  a.id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), aet.event_type_name, 'Unknown Event Type') AS event_name,
  CAST(a.snapshot_call_category AS text) AS call_category,
  COALESCE(outcome.name, 'No Outcome') AS outcome_name,
  COALESCE(CAST(outcome.role AS text), 'NO_OUTCOME') AS outcome_role,
  a.no_show,
  CAST(a.source AS text) AS appointment_source,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.host_id), ''), 'No Host') AS host_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.setter_id), ''), 'No Setter') AS setter_id,
  false AS has_fathom_record
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sales_statuses outcome
  ON outcome.id = a.outcome_id
 AND outcome.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_event_types aet
  ON aet.id = a.appointment_event_type_id
 AND aet.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
 AND aet.is_deleted = false
WHERE a.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND a.is_deleted = false
  AND a.schedule_time < NOW()
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fathom_call_records f_check
    WHERE f_check.appointment_id = a.id
      AND f_check.clerk_org_id = a.clerk_org_id
  )
ORDER BY a.schedule_time DESC, a.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

**Generated final answer**

Total matching records: 367

## 341. AAQ-341

**Question**

Which appointments have Fathom summaries?

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  f.id AS fathom_record_id,
  a.id AS appointment_id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.ai_generated_title), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), 'Untitled Call') AS call_title,
  f.summary,
  f.call_duration_seconds,
  f.call_started_at,
  f.call_ended_at
FROM fathom_call_records f
JOIN appointments a
  ON a.id = f.appointment_id
 AND a.clerk_org_id = f.clerk_org_id
 AND a.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = f.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
WHERE f.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND NULLIF(TRIM(f.summary), '') IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY COALESCE(f.call_started_at, a.schedule_time, f.created_at) DESC, f.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

**Generated final answer**

Total matching records: 81

## 342. AAQ-342

**Question**

Show me Fathom call summaries.

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  f.id AS fathom_record_id,
  a.id AS appointment_id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.ai_generated_title), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), 'Untitled Call') AS call_title,
  f.summary,
  f.key_points,
  f.action_items,
  f.objections,
  f.call_duration_seconds,
  f.call_started_at,
  f.call_ended_at
FROM fathom_call_records f
JOIN appointments a
  ON a.id = f.appointment_id
 AND a.clerk_org_id = f.clerk_org_id
 AND a.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = f.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
WHERE f.clerk_org_id = :org_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(f.call_started_at, a.schedule_time, f.created_at) DESC, f.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

## 343. AAQ-343

**Question**

List calls with Fathom summaries.

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  f.id AS fathom_record_id,
  a.id AS appointment_id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.ai_generated_title), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), 'Untitled Call') AS call_title,
  f.summary,
  f.call_duration_seconds,
  f.call_started_at,
  f.call_ended_at
FROM fathom_call_records f
JOIN appointments a
  ON a.id = f.appointment_id
 AND a.clerk_org_id = f.clerk_org_id
 AND a.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = f.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
WHERE f.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND NULLIF(TRIM(f.summary), '') IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY COALESCE(f.call_started_at, a.schedule_time, f.created_at) DESC, f.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

**Generated final answer**

Total matching records: 81

## 347. AAQ-347

**Question**

Show appointments where Fathom captured key points.

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  f.id AS fathom_record_id,
  a.id AS appointment_id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.ai_generated_title), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), 'Untitled Call') AS call_title,
  f.key_points
FROM fathom_call_records f
JOIN appointments a
  ON a.id = f.appointment_id
 AND a.clerk_org_id = f.clerk_org_id
 AND a.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = f.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
WHERE f.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND f.key_points IS NOT NULL
  AND f.key_points::text NOT IN ('null', '[]', '{}')
ORDER BY COALESCE(f.call_started_at, a.schedule_time, f.created_at) DESC, f.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

**Generated final answer**

No appointments were found where Fathom captured key points.

**Execution time:** 6.658 sec
**Status:** ok

```sql
    l.first_name,
```

## 349. AAQ-349

**Question**

Which calls have a Fathom summary this month?

**Generated SQL**

```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_matching_rows,
  f.id AS fathom_record_id,
  a.id AS appointment_id,
  a.schedule_time,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(TRIM(l.full_name), ''),
    NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ', l.first_name, l.last_name)), ''),
    l.first_name,
    'Unknown Lead'
  ) AS display_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.ai_generated_title), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(a.snapshot_event_name), ''), 'Untitled Call') AS call_title,
  f.summary,
  f.call_duration_seconds,
  f.call_started_at,
  f.call_ended_at
FROM fathom_call_records f
JOIN appointments a
  ON a.id = f.appointment_id
 AND a.clerk_org_id = f.clerk_org_id
 AND a.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN leads l
  ON l.id = a.lead_id
 AND l.clerk_org_id = f.clerk_org_id
 AND l.is_deleted = false
WHERE f.clerk_org_id = :org_id
  AND NULLIF(TRIM(f.summary), '') IS NOT NULL
  AND a.schedule_time >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
  AND a.schedule_time < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month'
ORDER BY COALESCE(f.call_started_at, a.schedule_time, f.created_at) DESC, f.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
```

**Generated final answer**

No calls with a Fathom summary were found this month.

**Execution time:** 6.647 sec
**Status:** ok

```sql
 AND a.clerk_org_id = f.clerk_org_id
```
